heading: Tyrrell Downs vs Ullina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tyrrell Downs, Victoria and Ullina, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tyrrell Downs and Ullina have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Tyrrell Downs or Ullina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tyrrell Downs has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Ullina scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tyrrell Downs scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Ullina scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tyrrell Downs or Ullina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tyrrell Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
